text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I notice an intense energy<n>emanating
from a certain corner of the<n>gym.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... C'mon, glutes!Don't fail me now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan's pushing her muscles<n>to the limit...
I find myself cheering her<n>on purely because of
how fierce her<n>drive is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pheeew! YEEEAH! I hit my goal!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ack! Sorry for all the yelling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I'm just stoked my muscles<n>were able to
do even more reps than<n>yesterday.
choice_data_list: Why stop there? Push yourself to the limit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you have a point. I hit my goal,<n>but that was
just some arbitrary<n>number I chose...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe my muscles wanna keep<n>going! Yeeeah,
let's gooo! Time to do<n>more reps!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan proceeds to do as many<n>squats as
she possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phew, it feels amazing to push<n>myself! Check out
my quads! They're<n>so happy, they're shaking!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for telling me to push myself<n>to my limits.
I would've gone home<n>with gas still left in my
tank if you<n>hadn't.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right, biceps, triceps, it's yourturn! Show me whatcha got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I love weight training because the<n>results don't
lie. All you gotta do is<n>knuckle down and train,
and you're<n>sure to reap the rewards.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I did more reps today than yesterday,<n>and I'll be
able to do even more<n>tomorrow! The growth is
tangible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, listen to me blabbering on! All<n>right, I've
gotta do some shoulder<n>presses next! Gains wait
for no one!
